launchers.text:
@echo off
setlocal
title Claire Syntalion - Stable Visible Dashboard Launcher

cd /d "%~dp0"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo  Claire Syntalion - Stable Visible Dashboard Launcher
echo ============================================================
echo.
echo Backend owns truth. Cockpit presentation only.
echo Runtime authority remains blocked.
echo Opening known visible cockpit shell directly.
echo.

start "Claire Backend" cmd /k "cd /d ""%~dp0"" && python main.py"

timeout /t 3 /nobreak >nul

if exist "%~dp0frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html" (
    start "" "%~dp0frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html"
) else (
    echo ERROR: frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html not found.
    pause
)

endlocal

@echo off
setlocal
title Claire Syntalion Launcher

REM ============================================================
REM Claire Syntalion - RESTORED WORKING LAUNCHER
REM
REM Current intended workflow:
REM   1. Start backend using python main.py
REM   2. Open LOCAL cockpit shell file
REM   3. Local cockpit fetches backend payload routes
REM
REM Backend truth routes:
REM   http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload/status
REM   http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload
REM ============================================================

cd /d "%~dp0"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo   Claire Syntalion Launcher
echo ============================================================
echo.

if not exist "main.py" (
    echo [BLOCKED] main.py not found.
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

if not exist "frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html" (
    echo [BLOCKED] cockpit_shell.html not found.
    echo Expected:
    echo frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

echo Starting backend...
start "Claire Backend" cmd /k "cd /d ""%CD%"" && python main.py"

echo Waiting for backend startup...
timeout /t 4 /nobreak >nul

echo Opening local cockpit dashboard...
start "" "%CD%\frontend\cockpit\shell\cockpit_shell.html"

echo.
echo Backend started.
echo Local cockpit opened.
echo.
echo Verify backend routes:
echo   http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
echo   http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload/status
echo   http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload
echo.

endlocal

@echo off
setlocal
title Claire Syntalion Launcher

REM ============================================================
REM Claire Syntalion - RESTORED WORKING LAUNCHER
REM
REM Current intended workflow:

@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion
title Claire Syntalion Launcher - HTTP Cockpit Authority

cd /d "%~dp0"

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo  Claire Syntalion - HTTP Cockpit Authority Launcher
echo ============================================================
echo.
echo Backend owns truth. Cockpit presentation only.
echo Runtime authority remains blocked.
echo.

set CLAIRE_HOST=127.0.0.1
set CLAIRE_PORT=8000
set CLAIRE_BASE=http://%CLAIRE_HOST%:%CLAIRE_PORT%

echo Starting Claire backend...
start "Claire Backend" cmd /k "cd /d ""%~dp0"" && python main.py"

echo Waiting for backend readiness...
set READY=0

for /l %%i in (1,1,30) do (
    powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing '%CLAIRE_BASE%/dashboard/payload/status' -TimeoutSec 2; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 } } catch { exit 1 }"
    if !errorlevel! equ 0 (
        set READY=1
        goto backend_ready
    )
    timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul
)

:backend_ready
if "%READY%"=="1" (
    echo Backend ready at %CLAIRE_BASE%
) else (
    echo Backend readiness check timed out. Opening HTTP cockpit anyway.
    echo If cockpit shows unavailable, wait a few seconds and refresh.
)

echo.
echo Opening cockpit through HTTP origin...
echo %CLAIRE_BASE%/
start "" "%CLAIRE_BASE%/"

echo.
echo IMPORTANT:
echo The browser address bar must start with:
echo %CLAIRE_BASE%
echo.
echo It must NOT start with file:///C:/
echo.
echo After cockpit opens, DevTools Console may verify:
echo window.location.protocol
echo window.ClaireLiveCockpitAuthorityBeacon
echo.

endlocal

@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion
title Claire Syntalion Launcher - Restored HTTP Dashboard

cd /d "%~dp0"

set CLAIRE_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8000

echo.
echo ============================================================
echo  Claire Syntalion - Restored Launcher
echo ============================================================
echo Backend owns truth. Cockpit presentation only.
echo Opens dashboard through HTTP, not file:///.
echo.

echo Starting Claire backend...
start "Claire Backend" cmd /k "cd /d ""%~dp0"" && python main.py"

echo Waiting for backend...
set READY=0
for /l %%i in (1,1,30) do (
    powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing '%CLAIRE_BASE%/' -TimeoutSec 2; if ($r.StatusCode -eq 200) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 } } catch { exit 1 }"
    if !errorlevel! equ 0 (
        set READY=1
        goto open_dashboard
    )
    timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul
)

:open_dashboard
if "%READY%"=="1" (
    echo Backend ready.
) else (
    echo Backend did not report ready within timeout. Opening dashboard URL anyway.
    echo If unavailable, check the Claire Backend window.
)

echo Opening dashboard:
echo %CLAIRE_BASE%/
start "" "%CLAIRE_BASE%/"

echo.
echo Address bar must start with:
echo %CLAIRE_BASE%
echo.
echo It must NOT start with file:///C:/
echo.
endlocal

main.py.text:
import sys
import os

ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
SRC = os.path.join(ROOT, "src")

if ROOT not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, ROOT)

if os.path.exists(SRC) and SRC not in sys.path:
    sys.path.append(SRC)

from claire.app import create_app

app = create_app()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run("main:app", host="127.0.0.1", port=8000, reload=True)

pyproject.toml.text:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=68.0", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "claire-syntalion"
version = "4.0.0"
description = "Claire Syntalion — Sovereign Autonomous R&D Enterprise Platform"
readme = "README.md"
license = {text = "Proprietary"}
requires-python = ">=3.10"
authors = [{name = "Craig Morris"}]
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.100.0",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.23.0",
    "pydantic>=2.0.0",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.0.0",
    "python-dotenv>=1.0.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=7.0",
    "pytest-asyncio",
    "httpx>=0.24.0"
]

[project.scripts]
claire = "claire.main:app"

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["."]
include = ["claire*", "backend*"]
exclude = ["src*", "old_backend*", "quarantine*", "frontend*", "tests*"]

pytest.ini.text:
[pytest]
testpaths = tests
pythonpath =
    .
    src
addopts = -q

norecursedirs =
    .git
    .venv
    venv
    env
    build
    dist
    operations
    archive
    _quarantine
    quarantine
    tests/_quarantine_legacy_backend_imports
    tests/placeholder_disabled
python_files = test_*.py

import json, urllib.request
urls = [
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/health',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/dashboard/payload/status',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/workflow/counts',
 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/workflow/monitoring',
]
out = []
for url in urls:
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=3) as r:
            out.append({'url': url, 'ok': True, 'status': r.status, 'body_start': r.read(500).decode('utf-8', 'ignore')})
    except Exception as e:
        out.append({'url': url, 'ok': False, 'error': repr(e)})
print(json.dumps(out))
